title: Session card component with status, activity, and selection states
purpose: Displays session information in a card format with interactive selection, status badges, and activity timestamps. Used in dashboard views to show session details.
module_context: Exports a SessionCard component that accepts session data and rendering props. Includes a helper function for formatting relative timestamps.

steps.content: Convert the input timestamp to a Date object if it's a string.
Calculate the time difference between now and the provided timestamp in milliseconds.
Convert the time difference into minutes, hours, and days.
IF the difference is less than a minute, return 'just now'.
ELSE IF the difference is less than an hour, return the number of minutes ago.
ELSE IF the difference is less than a day, return the number of hours ago.
ELSE IF the difference is less than a week, return the number of days ago.
ELSE return the date formatted as a localized string.
Render a button element with data-testid attribute for testing.
Apply conditional CSS classes for selected and hover states.
Display the session name and project path in the card header.
Show the session status badge if a display name is provided.
Display the item count if available.
Show the last activity timestamp with relative time formatting.
